changes.reason: Activate the dormant 1DTE pullback companion as a router discovery test while preserving the existing breakout_long_1dte route. This is a profile-split experiment, not direct tightening of the proven 1DTE breakout edge.
Ensure the newly routed companion profile is eligible to fire when VALID_1DTE_ONLY state resembles pullback/reclaim behavior rather than breakout continuation.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should reveal whether a 1DTE pullback companion can absorb some higher-heat VALID_1DTE_ONLY entries without suppressing the profitable breakout_long_1dte edge. Promote only if combined 1DTE PnL stays at least current $1305, total net profit remains within 2% of run_001, trade count does not drop more than 10%, and 1DTE average or worst MAE improves. Main risk is router cannibalization of profitable breakout_long_1dte trades or an unreachable companion profile.
recommendation.label: one-dte-pullback-companion-router-probe
recommendation.rationale: The leader is plateaued and prior direct breakout_long_1dte quality tightening hurt objective and net profit. VALID_1DTE_ONLY remains valuable with 20 trades and $1305 PnL, but it carries average MAE around -123.9 and worst MAE -375.7. The clean next experiment is a config-only profile split: add pullback_long_1dte to the one-DTE router while leaving breakout_long_1dte unchanged. This follows the strategist thesis of regime discovery instead of broad filtering or another take-profit tweak.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributes 20 trades and $1305.0 with no slow trades, but average MAE is -123.86 and worst MAE is -375.7. Prior direct 1DTE tightening reduced score and net profit, implying a companion split is preferable to weakening the parent.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Router ordering may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte entries, or pullback_long_1dte may be unreachable if trigger overlap is too narrow.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.9, total net profit remains >=98% of run_001, and completed trades do not drop more than 10%.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long adds $1237.7 over 34 trades with median hold 5.3m but owns the -527 worst MAE. Protected extended-VWAP winners are fast and profitable, so static extension filters remain too blunt.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: A path-aware classifier can overfit delayed recoveries; it must prove retention of protected fast extended-VWAP winners.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.
